title: Low Pressure Negative Chemical Ionisation Mass Spectra of Friedelane Derivatives
author: K. P. MADHUSUDANAN
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Medicinal Chemistry Division, Central Drug Research Institute, Lucknow-226 001 
 Manuscript received 22 May 2985, accepted 30 August 1985  

 Low pressure negative chemical ionisation mass spectra of several C 3  and C 7  oxy­genated friedelanes have been studied using sodium bicarbonate to generate the reagent ions. Ionisation and fragmentation are directed by the functional groups present. Intense (M — H) -  ion and a few structurally diagnostic fragment ion peaks are observed. The presence of carbonyl function at C 3  or C 7  leads to fragments originat­ing  via   \(\gamma\)  -H  rearrangement.
